artPrompt: A grimy goblin in a patched too-small hazmat suit, cracked visor fogged, gesturing commandingly amid rusted pipes and bubbling toxic runoff, sickly green bioluminescence glinting off its suit, mutant overgrowth and rust-red stains hazing into a bruised stormy sky, drifting litter around its boots, a tender beleaguered authority in the murky light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Hazmat Team Leader
text:
Other Goblins and Mutants you control get +1/+0.
When Hazmat Team Leader enters the battlefield, choose a creature you control. It gains "When this creature dies, it deals 2 damage to each opponent" until end of turn. Safety first, casualties also first.
flavorText: Issued one suit per crew. The crew was forty goblins.
